sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving RIGHT to push target through corridor
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print(f"RIGHT: done={result.get('done')}, level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('O', 'b', 'W'):
        b = n['boundary']
        if len(b) >= 2:
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# If not done, try one more RIGHT
if not result.get('done') and not result.get('level_completed'):
    result2 = action(['RIGHT'])
    print(f"\nRIGHT2: done={result2.get('done')}, level_completed={result2.get('level_completed')}")
    seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg2['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('O', 'b', 'W'):
            b = n['boundary']
            if len(b) >= 2:
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
